common.metaDescription: LevelHabit is a gamified habit tracker for habits, XP, streaks, achievements, and personal progress.

auth.summary: Small daily actions create lasting change. Build better habits, maintain your streaks, track your progress, and become the best version of yourself.
auth.buildHabitsSummary: Create routines that support your goals.
auth.maintainStreaksSummary: Stay consistent and keep your momentum going.
auth.earnAchievementsSummary: Gain XP, level up, and celebrate your progress.
auth.registerSummary: Create an account and begin building momentum.
auth.loginSummary: Sign in to continue your progress.
auth.emailConfirmed: Your email has been confirmed. You can now log in.
auth.verificationNotice: Account created. Check {{email}} to verify your email address.
auth.verificationNoticeGeneric: Account created. Check your inbox to verify your email address.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.displayNameMinLength: Display name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.displayNameMaxLength: Display name must be 80 characters or fewer.
validation.progressDisplayNameMinLength: Progress display name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.progressDisplayNameMaxLength: Progress display name must be 80 characters or fewer.
validation.reminderDayRequired: Select at least one reminder day.

passwordRecovery.sent: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link has been sent.
passwordRecovery.missingDetails: This reset link is missing required details.

verification.title: Enter your code
verification.sentTo: We sent a six-digit code to {{email}}.
verification.resendSent: If an unconfirmed account exists for this email, a verification code has been sent.
verification.confirmed: Your email has been confirmed successfully.

dashboard.title: Habit board
dashboard.summary: A focused run of daily habits, XP progress, streak safety, and rewards.

habits.title: Active habits
habits.summary: Daily routines framed as repeatable habits with cadence, difficulty, and XP.

progress.title: Your progress
progress.summary: Build consistency, track your growth, and turn daily habits into lasting progress.

achievements.title: Milestone vault
achievements.summary: Unlockable badges for streaks, balanced routines, and high-consistency days.

analytics.title: Consistency map
analytics.summary: A lightweight read on weekly momentum, category balance, and XP output.

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.noHabitSummary: Create a habit to start filling the board.

habits.label: Habits
habits.title: Title
habits.emptyPersisted: Create a habit to fill this view.
habits.emptyPrototype: Try another filter to see more sample habits.
habits.archivedReminder: Reminders are disabled while this habit is archived.

progress.label: Progress profile
progress.browserSummary: In-app reminders are always stored in LevelHabit. Browser notifications only appear while LevelHabit is open in this version.
progress.unsupported: Browser notifications are not supported in this browser.
progress.denied: Browser permission is denied. Update your browser settings to enable it.

achievements.label: Achievements
achievements.emptySummary: Refresh this view once the backend is available.

on-fire.title: On Fire
on-fire.summary: Reach a 3-day streak on any habit.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.noActivitySummary: Create and complete habits to fill this dashboard.
analytics.emptyTrend: Daily trends will appear after your first persisted completion.
analytics.noRecent: Recent completions will appear after your first habit completion.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address before logging in.
errors.invalidCredentials: Email or password was not recognized.
errors.apiUnavailable: LevelHabit API is not reachable right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.resetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
errors.verificationMissingEmail: The email address for this verification request is missing.
errors.verificationInvalid: The verification code is invalid or expired.
errors.backendUnavailable: The backend is unavailable. Try again when the API is running.
errors.sessionNotifications: Your session expired. Sign in again to view notifications.
errors.habitNotFound: That habit could not be found.
errors.habitAlreadyComplete: That habit is already completed today.
errors.sessionHabits: Your session expired. Sign in again to manage habits.
errors.sessionAchievements: Your session expired. Sign in again to view achievements.
errors.sessionAnalytics: Your session expired. Sign in again to view analytics.
errors.backendStart: The backend is unavailable. Start the API and try again.
errors.reminderBackend: The backend is unavailable. Your habit values are still here.
